subsection.heading: Administration.—
subsection.content: Except as otherwise provided in this chapter, the Secretary shall administer the provision of educational assistance under this chapter.

subsection.heading: Costs.—
subsection.content: Payments for entitlement to educational assistance earned under this chapter shall be made from funds appropriated to, or otherwise made available to, the Department for the payment of readjustment benefits.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Aug. 1, 2009, see section 5003(d) of Pub. L. 110–252, set out as an Effective Date of 2008 Amendment note under section 16163 of Title 10, Armed Forces.
